theory.canonical_statement: ID 449 establishes the legal and ethical framework for the "Trawin Zero Point Opera Omnia." All engineering specifications within this registry are governed by the Modified Educational Research License (MERL 50). While theoretical exploration is permitted for academic and non commercial use, industrial applications and commercial implementations require separate licensing and partnership agreements. Attribution: All uses must cite the work of Daniel Alexander Trawin. Protection: Engineering details are subject to separate intellectual property protections to ensure the responsible deployment of the technology.
